creator: molily@selfhtml.org
text:
A new version of SELFHTML, a popular german documentation on Web authoring, has been released. I kindly ask you to update the corresponding port »selfhtml«.

Fix: 

This is the ZIP of the new version 8.1.2:
http://aktuell.de.selfhtml.org/extras/selfhtml812.zip

Size: 8435931 Bytes
MD5: 81806920c148ace4f24e8a8239f075ac
SHA1: b5cc097ea1f74b65165d426f39ee2d3b81e2c84b
Signature: http://aktuell.de.selfhtml.org/extras/selfhtml812.zip.asc

You'll find some sources at
http://aktuell.de.selfhtml.org/extras/download.shtml#adressen

Regards,
Mathias Schäfer
SELFHTML developer
